title: The 'Best Balance Sheets' Portfolio: T. Rowe Price Group
text: TROW has outperformed the market since a rough Q3 print and now appears fairly valued. A top-notch balance sheet, solid marketing, and shareholder-friendly management should calm investors as the firm works to right the ship.

title: Is Now the Time to Buy This High-Yielding Dividend Aristocrat?
text: The market downturn hasn't been kind to this asset manager's earnings results or share price.

title: T. Rowe Price: Not So Attractive Anymore
text: Asset manager T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. underperformed in its recent Q3 card, but the market has likely anticipated a weak earnings release. As such, T. Rowe Price Group still managed to bottom in October (pre-earnings) and even surge to its August highs recently, outperforming the S&P 500 significantly.

title: 3 Top Investment Industry Stocks to Buy in November
text: There's no easy way around it; investment managers perform poorly during bear markets. But bull markets can be a fun ride.

title: 3 Ultra-High-Yielding Finance Stocks to Buy With $1,000

title: Walgreens Named November Aristocrats Top Dog
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years." - Kiplinger.com/Investing. 65 Aristocrats screened as of November 8, 2022 represented all eleven Morningstar sectors. Broker-estimated top-ten net gains ranged 11.21%-36.63%, topped by MDT & ESS.
